title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.260 - Who may recover rent
text:
441.260.  Who may recover rent. — Any person to whom rent is due, whether he have the reversion or not or his personal representatives or assignee, may recover such rent, as provided in sections 441.240 and 441.250, whatever be the estate of the person owning the land, or though his estate or interest in it be ended.
(RSMo 1939 § 2988) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2601; 1919 § 6895; 1909 § 7898
